commissioning.past_week: This week is in the past and cannot be modified anymore.
commissioning.share_days_locked: The day fields on this share are locked because ShareContent already exists for it.
commissioning.already_finalized: This record is finalized and cannot be modified anymore.
commissioning.invalid: Invalid input — please check the data and try again.
commissioning.not_enough_stock: Not enough stock for this action.

stock.insufficient: Not enough stock for this action.

subscription.start_too_soon: The subscription can't start before {{earliest}} ({{min_weeks}} week(s) lead time).
subscription.confirmed_immutable: A confirmed subscription can no longer be edited or deleted — end it via cancellation instead.
subscription.variation_locked: A confirmed subscription's share-type variation can no longer be changed — create a new subscription instead.
subscription.renewal_variation_unavailable: Auto-renewal found no share-type variation of the same size covering the whole new term. Add or extend a matching variation.
subscription.renewal_price_unavailable: Auto-renewal could not resolve a price for the renewal term. Configure a price for the new term and renew again.

cancel.invalid: The cancellation is invalid — please check the date.
cancel.not_confirmed: Only confirmed subscriptions can be cancelled.
cancel.not_sunday: The cancellation date must fall on a Sunday (end of the delivery week).
cancel.in_past: The cancellation date can't be in the past — the earliest possible is the next Sunday.
cancel.before_valid_from: The cancellation date must be on or after the subscription's start date.
cancel.after_valid_until: The cancellation date must be on or before the subscription's end date.
cancel.no_sunday_remains: No valid Sunday remains between today and the subscription's end — let the term expire naturally.

subscription.open_ended_not_allowed: A subscription must have an end date. Open-ended subscriptions are not allowed.
subscription.no_active_price: This share-type variation has no valid price for the chosen start date. Please pick a different start date or variation.
subscription.solidarity_price_below_minimum: The chosen price ({{chosen}}) is below the minimum price ({{minimum}}) for this share-type variation. Please choose a price of at least {{minimum}}.
subscription.delivery_station_day_out_of_range: The selected delivery-station day doesn't cover the whole subscription term — it starts after the subscription begins or ends (with no successor day) before the subscription ends. Please choose a delivery-station day that covers the term.

bulk_renew.ids_required: Provide a non-empty list of subscription ids.
bulk_renew.too_many_ids: At most 500 subscriptions can be renewed per request.

subscription.cancel_draft: Draft subscriptions cannot be cancelled — delete them instead.
subscription.renewal_chain_number_missing: The predecessor subscription has no subscription number to inherit — fix the predecessor's numbering first, then renew again.

member.link_conflict: Cannot link — this user is already attached to a different member.
member.user_already_linked: This user is already linked to a member.
member.user_in_blocked_status: This user is blocked and cannot be invited.
member.user_already_active: This user is already active — no invitation needed.
member.no_email: This member has no email address — please add one first.
member.invitation_invalid: This invitation is no longer valid.
member.coop_shares_out_of_range: This member's number of cooperative shares ({{total}}) is outside the allowed range. Please adjust the cooperative shares before confirming the member.
member.coop_shares_out_of_range_range: This member has {{total}} cooperative share(s). The allowed range is between {{minimum}} and {{maximum}}. Please adjust the cooperative shares before confirming the member.
member.coop_shares_out_of_range_min: This member has {{total}} cooperative share(s) but needs at least {{minimum}}. Please adjust the cooperative shares before confirming the member.
member.coop_shares_out_of_range_max: This member has {{total}} cooperative share(s); at most {{maximum}} are allowed. Please adjust the cooperative shares before confirming the member.
member.profile_not_linked: No member profile is linked to this user account.
member.locked_after_admin_confirmation: This field is legally fixed once the member is confirmed and can no longer be changed.
member.has_active_subscriptions: You can only cancel once you have no active subscriptions. Please cancel or let your subscriptions expire first.

cancel.effective_at_in_past: The effective date cannot be in the past.

member.confirmed_immutable: A confirmed member can’t be deleted — end the membership via cancellation instead.

coop_share.contract_agreement_required: Please agree to the subscription contract to subscribe cooperative shares.
coop_share.value_not_configured: The value of one cooperative share is not configured. Please contact the office.
coop_share.invalid_amount: The number of coop shares must be greater than 0.
coop_share.confirmed_immutable: A confirmed cooperative share can’t be deleted — cancel the share (or the member) instead.

share_type.succession_has_active_variations: Can't start a new share type while the current one still has variations active on or after this date. End those variations first, or choose a later start date.
share_type.shortening_strands_variation: Can't end this share type on the given date: some variations are open or end after it and would outlive their parent. End or shorten those variations first, or choose a later end date.

time_bound.succession_start_before_predecessor: Can't start a new record before the existing open record it would succeed. Choose a start date on or after the existing record's, or close the existing record first.

share_type_variation.outside_share_type_range: A variation's validity must lie within its share type's validity — it can't start before the share type, nor end after it (or stay open once the share type has ended).
share_type_variation.succession_has_active_subscriptions: A new variation for this share type and size can only start after the last subscription on the current one has ended. End those subscriptions first, or choose a later start date.
share_type_variation.shortening_strands_subscriptions: Can't end this variation on the given date: some subscriptions are open or end after it and would outlive their variation. End those subscriptions first, or choose a later end date.
share_type_variation.missing_bulk: One or more of the given share type variations do not exist.

tenant_settings.coop_shares_bounds_inverted: The minimum number of coop shares cannot exceed the maximum.

share_content.invalid: Invalid share content input — please check the data.
share_content.missing_required: Missing required fields: year, delivery week, or share article.

delivery_note.finalize_failed: Could not finalize the delivery note before creating the invoice.
delivery_note.already_exists: A delivery note already exists for this order.
delivery_note.already_finalized: This delivery note is already finalized and can no longer be changed.
delivery_note.empty: Cannot finalize a delivery note with no items.

delivery_day.valid_from_in_past: A delivery day cannot be created with a valid-from date in the past.

delivery_station.invalid: Invalid delivery station input — please check the data.
delivery_station.over_capacity: This delivery station is full for week {{week}}/{{year}} ({{occupied}}/{{capacity}}). Please pick another station.
delivery_station.capacity_below_occupancy: Capacity can't be set to {{capacity}} — {{peak}} share(s) are already booked for week {{week}}/{{year}}. Please choose at least {{peak}}.
delivery_station.in_use: This delivery station cannot be deleted while deliveries still reference its pickup days. Move or end those deliveries first.

delivery_exception.invalid_range: The delivery-pause period is invalid — it must start on a Monday, end on a Sunday, and the start must not be after the end.
delivery_exception.overlap: The period overlaps an existing delivery pause for this share-type variation.
delivery_exception.locked: This delivery pause has already started or lies in the past and can no longer be changed or deleted.

invoice.circular_cancellation: Cancellation reference loop detected — please check the link.
invoice.storno_missing_target: A storno invoice must reference the invoice being cancelled.
invoice.already_exists: An invoice already exists for this delivery note.
invoice.already_finalized: This invoice is already finalized and can no longer be changed.
invoice.dn_not_finalized: The delivery note is not finalized yet.
invoice.empty: Cannot finalize an invoice with no items.
invoice.mixed_resellers: All delivery notes must belong to the same reseller.

order.already_finalized: This order is already finalized and can no longer be changed.

order_content.finalized: Cannot update a finalized order content.

packing_list.amounts_diverge_across_stations: Packing amounts differ between delivery stations. Select a delivery station (or tour) to view the packing list.

reseller.invalid: Invalid reseller input — please check the data.
reseller.already_linked: This reseller is already linked to a different user.
reseller.customer_role_required: Reseller link is only available for the 'customer' role.
reseller.email_missing: This reseller has no billing email address configured.

offer_group.cannot_delete_default: The default offer group cannot be deleted.

export.invalid_dates: Invalid date range for export — please check the start and end dates.

admin_user.not_pending_invitation: No pending invitation exists for this user.

auth.invalid_credentials: Login failed — email or password is incorrect.
auth.invalid_token: Session invalid or expired — please sign in again.
auth.missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
auth.refresh_missing: Session expired — please sign in again.
auth.tenant_mismatch: This account does not belong to this tenant.
auth.step_up_required: This action requires re-authentication to confirm identity.

two_factor.already_enrolled: Two-factor authentication (2FA) is already set up.
two_factor.challenge_invalid: The 2FA challenge is invalid or expired — please sign in again.
two_factor.enrolment_required: This role requires two-factor authentication (2FA) to be set up.
two_factor.invalid_code: The 2FA code is incorrect — please try again.
two_factor.not_enrolled: No two-factor authentication (2FA) is set up for this account.

password_reset.invalid_link: This password reset link is invalid or expired.
password_reset.weak_password: Password too weak — please pick a stronger one.

invitation.invalid: This invitation is no longer valid.

registration.host_disabled: Registration is not available on this host.
registration.weak_password: The password is too weak — please choose a stronger one.

profile.permission_denied: You don't have permission to modify this profile.

required_field.missing: Required field missing — please fill it in.

bad_request: Invalid request — please check the data.
forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.
conflict: Cannot perform action — another record is blocking it.
rate_limited: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.
internal_error: Internal error — please try again or contact support.

query.invalid_param: Invalid request parameter — please check your input and try again.

shares_delivery_day.not_found: No active delivery day found for the given day.
shares_delivery_day.tours_reduced_while_in_use: This delivery day is already in use — the number of tours can only be increased, not reduced. Lowering it would strand deliveries on the removed tours.
shares_delivery_day.shortening_strands_children: This delivery day can't end on that date: future station-days or shares would outlive it and be stranded. Create a successor instead (add a new delivery day), or pick a later end date.
shares_delivery_day.succession_coverage_gap: Couldn't complete the delivery-day succession: a station has no station-day covering the affected week on the new day. Set up that station-day first, then retry.
shares_delivery_day.in_use: This delivery day cannot be deleted because shares already reference it. Once used, it can no longer be removed.

delivery_station_day.shortening_strands_children: This station-day can't end on that date: future deliveries or capacity reservations would outlive it and be stranded. Create a successor station-day (which migrates them), or pick a later end date.
delivery_station_day.in_use: This pickup day cannot be deleted while deliveries still reference it. Move or end those deliveries first.

data_import.invalid: The uploaded file could not be imported — please check the file and try again.

customer.profile_not_linked: No customer profile is linked to this user account.

bulk_documents.model_invalid: Invalid document type — must be a delivery note or an invoice.

billing_run.invalid_period: The end date must be on or after the start date.
billing_run.no_eligible_charges: No eligible planned charges found in the selected period.
billing_run.no_valid_mandates: No charges with a valid SEPA mandate found.
billing_run.not_draft: This billing run has already been exported and cannot be re-exported.
billing_run.no_charges: This billing run has no charges.
billing_run.invalid_collection_date: The collection date must not be in the past.
billing_run.mixed_currency: The due charges have different currencies. A billing run must use a single currency.

sepa.export_invalid: Cannot export SEPA file: required creditor or debtor fields are missing.

crate_delivery_note_content.missing_required: Delivery note, crate type and amount are required.

crate_content_invoice.missing_required: Invoice, crate type and amount are required.

amount.invalid: Invalid amount — please enter a valid number.

composite_id.invalid: Invalid id — please reload the page and try again.

authz.cross_owner_access: No access to another owner's data.
authz.no_linked_owner: No owning record is linked to this account — this action is not possible.
authz.privilege_required: This action is restricted to office staff.

captcha.verification_failed: Captcha verification failed — please try again.

consent.already_revoked: This consent has already been revoked.
consent.document_in_use: This consent document is already in use and cannot be deleted — publish a new version instead.
consent.target_member_unresolved: No target member could be inferred from the request.

document.date_required: A date is required for this document.
document.not_finalized: The document must be finalized before a PDF can be uploaded.
document.pdf_missing: No PDF has been uploaded yet — please upload the PDF first.

email_template.dispatch_failed: Sending the email failed — please try again later.
email_template.test_send_no_recipient: No recipient address is available for the test send.
email_template.undeclared_placeholders: The template uses variables that are not available for this email: {{placeholders}}. Please use only the variables shown.

gdpr.deletion_not_pending_admin: This deletion request is not awaiting approval and cannot be processed.
gdpr.deletion_token_expired: The deletion confirmation link has expired — please request deletion again.
gdpr.deletion_token_invalid: The deletion confirmation link is invalid.
gdpr.error: GDPR action not possible — please check the current state.
gdpr.retention_active: Anonymization not possible — a statutory retention period is still active.

optin.deadline_passed: The opt-in deadline has passed and can no longer be changed.
optin.not_applicable: This delivery does not use opt-in.

trial.members_not_allowed: Trial members are not allowed for this tenant.
trial.subscriptions_not_allowed: Trial subscriptions are not allowed for this tenant.
trial.subscriptions_only_for_full_members: Trial subscriptions are only allowed for full members for this tenant.

uploaded_document.invalid: The uploaded document is invalid — please check the file type and content.

virtual_component.not_physical: This variation is not a physical variation and cannot be used as a component.
virtual_component.physical_variation_not_found: The specified physical variation could not be found.

bulk_copy_offers.ids_required: Provide a non-empty list of offer ids.

bulk_invoice_reminder.ids_required: Provide a non-empty list of ids.

bulk_set_paid.ids_required: Provide a non-empty list of order ids.

summary_invoice.ids_required: Provide a non-empty list of order ids.
summary_invoice.no_valid_dns: No valid delivery notes found to create a summary invoice.

default_share_content.no_amounts: No share type variation amounts were provided.

delivery_station_fee.invalid_range: Start date must be on or before the end date.

finalize.model_not_found: The requested model was not found.
finalize.one_way_model: Finalized documents are legally immutable and cannot be unfinalized. To reverse, create a storno; to revise, issue a correction document.

share_import.apply_failed: The import could not be applied.
share_import.invalid_status: The import batch is in a status that cannot be applied (needs preview_ready or validated).

shares_day_change.missing_required: Year and delivery week are required.
